data.description:
## What
Rename DSO-named mock fixtures + fix stale dso-CLI comments in tests. MUST NOT touch the DSO-<id> Jira project-key fixtures nor tests/unit/rebar_reconciler/mutate/test_env_aliasing.py (intentional removal guard).

## Files
- tests/unit/rebar_reconciler/orchestrate/test_invariants.py + test_at_most_one_invariant.py (mock ticket_cli=/fake/dso, cmd=dso -> /fake/rebar)
- tests/unit/rebar_reconciler/{diffing/test_outbound_differ_machine_marker_exclusion.py, conflict/test_conflict_filing_deferred.py, mutate/test_apply_batch_drift_tolerance.py}, tests/interfaces/facades/test_surface.py, tests/scripts/reducer/test_reducer_links.py (stale dso ticket ... comments)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] /fake/dso mock paths renamed to /fake/rebar
- [ ] stale "dso ticket ..." comments updated to "rebar ..."
- [ ] DSO-<id> Jira fixtures and test_env_aliasing.py left untouched
- [ ] Full non-integration suite green
data.title: WU-3: scrub DSO naming from tests (exclude DSO-<id> fixtures + env-aliasing guard)
